match.semantic.not_installed: Semantic matching requires `pip install openconstructionerp[semantic]`. Exact-match results are shown; install the extra for fuzzy cost matching.
match.reason.exact_match: Exact match on the normalized description.
match.reason.strong_overlap: Every search term was found in this cost item.
match.reason.partial_overlap: Some search terms were found in this cost item.
match.reason.weak_overlap: Few or no search terms matched this cost item.
match.hint.empty_query: Enter a material or work description to search the cost database.
match.hint.no_candidates: No cost items are loaded for this catalogue yet. Load a regional cost base first.
match.hint.no_good_match: No confident match found. Try fewer words, the material name on its own, or the description in another language.
